---
title: "Luis D. Verde Arregoitia"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/luis.jpg){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:luisd@ciencias.unam.mx)  
[luisdva.github.io](https://luisdva.github.io/)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**Assistant Researcher (Técnico Titular A), SNI I**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Mammals]{.profile-tag} [Ecomorphology]{.profile-tag} [Macroecology]{.profile-tag} [R programming]{.profile-tag} [Data Science]{.profile-tag}

I am a mammalogist and conservation scientist. I grew up in Mexico City, where I studied Biology at Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México before earning a PhD at the University of Queensland, Australia. I have held research fellowships in Switzerland and Chile, and my current focus is on the ecology and evolution of small mammals. Additionally, I enjoy teaching and applying data cleaning, analysis, and visualization in R.

### Education

- **PhD** — University of Queensland, Australia (2014)
- **BSc** — Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (2009)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
